junction.name: badge_mappings
junction.brief: Links a (code domain, entity code) pair to a badge definition.
junction.description:
Universal mapping table that associates any (code_domain, entity_code)
pair with a badge definition. This is the single join point between
domain values and their visual presentation.

Examples:
- ('party_status', 'ACTIVE')  -> 'active'
- ('party_status', 'FROZEN')  -> 'frozen'
- ('fsm_state',    'DRAFT')   -> 'fsm_draft'
- ('login_status', 'Online')  -> 'login_online'
- ('dq_nature',    'Actual')  -> 'dq_actual'

Populated via seed scripts; no management UI needed.

left.index_comment: Index for looking up all mappings in a code domain
left.description: Code of the domain this mapping belongs to.

right.index_comment: Index for finding the badge for a specific entity code
right.description: The domain value being mapped to a badge.

columns.name: badge_code
columns.description: The badge definition to use for this mapping.
